## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature.

## Use Case
Describe the automation use case this would enable.

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this to work?

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any workarounds?

## Related Integration
Does this relate to an app on [Appy Pie Automate](https://appypieautomate.ai/integrations)?
